summary.zh: 比较时长与延迟对响应速度、节奏和可感知等待的影响。
summary.en: Compare how duration and delay affect response, rhythm, and perceived waiting.

definition.zh: 一段动画完成所需的时间。
definition.en: Duration measures the elapsed time from an animation's start state to its end state.

description.zh: 控制一次动效完成所需的时间。
description.en: Controls the time required for one motion cycle.

description.zh: 控制动效开始前的等待时间。
description.en: Controls the wait before motion begins.

description.zh: 控制速度随时间变化的方式。
description.en: Controls how velocity changes over time.

purpose.zh: 比较时长与延迟对响应速度、阅读节奏和可感知等待的影响。
purpose.en: Compare how duration and delay affect responsiveness, reading rhythm, and perceived waiting.

frequency.zh: 每种高频交互都需要校准；低频展示动画可采用更宽松范围。
frequency.en: Calibrate every frequent interaction; low-frequency presentation motion can use a broader range.

trigger.zh: 由控件状态变化触发，同一交互中的延迟只用于表达依赖关系。
trigger.en: Trigger on control-state changes, using delay only to express dependency within the interaction.

enterExit.zh: 进入通常比退出稍长；关闭、撤销和返回应快速响应。
enterExit.en: Entrances can run slightly longer than exits; closing, undoing, and returning respond quickly.

interruptibility.zh: 新输入立即取消等待，并从当前值过渡到最新目标。
interruptibility.en: New input cancels pending delay immediately and transitions from the current value to the latest target.

gestureRules.zh: 连续调节时实时更新目标，释放手势后只执行必要的收敛。
gestureRules.en: During continuous adjustment, update the target live and settle only as needed after release.

reducedMotion.zh: 将非必要时长压缩到接近即时，延迟归零。
reducedMotion.en: Make nonessential transitions effectively immediate and remove delay.

reviewNotes.zh: 用真实操作频率评估时长，避免只看单次演示。
reviewNotes.en: Evaluate duration at real interaction frequency, beyond a single replay.

reviewNotes.zh: 确认延迟不会让用户误以为输入失效。
reviewNotes.en: Ensure delay never makes input appear unresponsive.
